name: Zen Technologies Limited
summary: Zen Technologies Limited, together with its subsidiary, designs, develops, and manufactures training simulators in India and internationally. It offers firearms training, advanced weapon, hand grenade, driving training, artillery forward observer, driving and automated driving, tactical engagement, anti-tank guided missile, tank gunnery and crew gunnery, and tank driving simulators. The company also provides combat training simulation, smart target, tank target and zeroing, multi-functional target, air-to-ground firing range, driver aptitude testing, and armour combat training systems; bus driving, mortar integrated and carrier motor tracked, hand grenades, infantry weapon training, medium machine gun, automatic grenade launcher, integrated air defense combat, anti-aircraft air defense, UAV mission, and rotary wing simulators; and war gaming solutions. In addition, it offers master control station for live-firing ranges, indoor tracking systems, infantry combat vehicle driving simulators, and BMP II integrated missile simulators; and digital beamforming solutions. Further, the company operates containerized tubular and indoor shooting range; and shoot house for live and simulated indoor tactical training. It serves police, para-military, armed, and security forces; government departments comprising transport, mining, and infrastructure; and the civilian market. Zen Technologies Limited was incorporated in 1993 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
